patterns: kitni baar hospital jaana hai pregnancy mein
pehla ANC visit kab hona chahiye
responses:
ANC Checkup Schedule (MoHFW India):
• Pehla visit: 12 hafte ke andar (pehli timahi mein)
• Doosra visit: 14–26 hafte
• Teesra visit: 28–34 hafte
• Chautha visit: 36 hafte ke baad

HAR MAHINE ANC FREE hai Nabha Civil Hospital aur PHC mein. PMSMA: har mahine 9 tarikh ko FREE antenatal check-up milta hai.

Pregnancy mein minimum 4 ANC visits zaruri hain:
1. Pehle 3 mahine (Week 1–12)
2. 3–6 mahine (Week 14–26)
3. 6–8 mahine (Week 28–34)
4. 8–10 mahine (Week 36+)

High-risk hain to zyada baar milna hoga — ASHA worker ya ANM se puchein. Yeh sab FREE hain government hospital mein.
PMSMA scheme ke tahat: Har mahine 9 tarikh ko PRIMARY HEALTH CENTRE mein FREE antenatal check-up hota hai — blood test, BP, weight, ultrasound sab included. Apni ASHA worker se appointment lein.

Aapka agla checkup kab ka hai? Yeh depend karta hai weeks pregnant hain:
• 1–28 weeks: Har 28 din (mahine mein ek baar)
• 28–36 weeks: Har 14 din (15 din mein ek baar)
• 36–40 weeks: Har 7 din (weekly)

High-risk hain to doble baar milna hoga.

patterns: high risk pregnancy kya hota hai
responses:
ArogyaGram CDSS (Clinical Decision Support System) 4 risk levels use karta hai:
🟢 NORMAL — Routine ANC, mahine mein ek baar
🟡 MEDIUM — Closer monitoring, 48 ghante mein doctor se milein
🔴 HIGH — Aaj hi civil hospital jayein
🚨 EMERGENCY — Abhi 108 call karein

Apni ANM ya ASHA worker se puchein ki aapka risk band kya hai.

High-risk pregnancy ke common karan:
• Hemoglobin 7 se kam (severe anemia)
• BP 140/90 se zyada (pre-eclampsia)
• Urine mein protein zyada
• Gestational diabetes (GDM)
• Baby ki position seedhi nahi (breech)
• Twins
• Pehle C-section hua tha
• Eclampsia ya seizures ka itihas

Agar koi bhi sign hai, aaj hi doctor se milein.

Normal pregnancy mein:
• BP 90/60 se 130/85 ke beech rehta hai
• Hemoglobin 11 g/dL se zyada hona chahiye
• Weight theek se badh raha ho
• Baby ki movement sahi ho
• Koi swelling na ho

Agar kuch bhi alag lage — ASHA worker ko batayein turant.

patterns: bahut zyada khoon aa raha hai pregnancy mein
baby ki movement band ho gayi
seizures ho rahe hain pregnancy mein
tez sar dard aur aankhon ke aage andhera
ghar pe delivery ho rahi hai
baby janam ke baad roo nahi raha
responses:
🚨 EMERGENCY — ABHI 108 CALL KAREIN (FREE, 24/7)

Yeh avstha mein seedha hospital jaana zaroori hai:
• Heavy bleeding during pregnancy
• Baby ki movement band (12+ ghante)
• Seizures / behoshi
• Tez sar dard + high BP + aankhon ke aage andhera (pre-eclampsia)

Ghar pe delivery hoti ho to 108 call karo, ASHA worker ko call karo, aur saaf kapda + garam paani taiyaar karo. Naal (umbilical cord) khud mat kaato.

Baby ke janam ke turant baad agar ROTA NAHI to:
1. Uski pith thapthapao halke se
2. Uske mooh aur naak saaf kapde se saaf karo
3. 108 turant call karo
4. Asha worker ke paas sona gold kit hoti hai — unhe bulaao

Yeh NEONATAL EMERGENCY hai — hospital mein 'Sick Newborn Care Unit (SNCU)' milegi FREE.

Pre-eclampsia ke liye 🔴 EMERGENCY signs:
• BP 140/90 se zyada
• Sar mein bahut tez dard
• Aankhon ke aage andhera ya dhundhlapa
• Haathon-paon mein bahut zyada sujan
• Urine mein protein (urine test se pata chalta hai)

Yeh signs hain to ABHI 108 call karo. Rajindra Hospital Patiala refer ho sakta hai.

patterns: iron tablet kyon leni chahiye pregnancy mein
folic acid ka kya role hai
responses:
Pregnancy mein zaruri FREE supplements (Nabha Civil Hospital / ASHA se milte hain):

💊 IFA (Iron + Folic Acid): Roz ek tablet, pehle mahine se. Anemia se bachata hai — baby ke liye khoon zaruri hai.
💊 Calcium (500mg): Din mein do baar, 4th mahine se. Haddiyan aur bachche ki growth ke liye.
💉 TT (Tetanus Toxoid): 2 injections — pahli baar pregnancy mein. Tetanus se bachata hai.

Sab FREE hain — ASHA ya ANM se lein.

IFA tablet se ulti aati hai to:
• Raat ko sone ke waqt lein
• Khane ke baad lein
• Nimbu paani ke baad lein

Par band mat karein — anemia (khoon ki kami) mein Hb 7 se kam ho to EMERGENCY ban sakti hai. Apni ANM ko batayein.

Folic Acid (pehle 3 mahine) bahut zaroori hai:
• Baby ke dimaag aur reeed ki haddi sahi bane
• Neural tube defects se bachata hai
• Pehle 12 hafte mein lena sabse important hai

Iron tablet se hemoglobin upar aata hai — delivery ke waqt khooon ki zaroorat hoti hai.

Yeh supplements anganwadi se bhi mil sakti hain.

TT (Tetanus Toxoid) schedule:
• TT-1: Pregnancy mein pehla teeka jaldi lein
• TT-2: TT-1 ke 4 hafte baad
• Agar pehle 3 saal mein TT liya tha: sirf ek booster

FREE hai Nabha Civil Hospital aur PHC mein.

patterns: pregnancy mein pet mein dard ho raha hai
garbhawastha mein chakkar aa rahe hain
pregnancy mein ulti bahut ho rahi hai
pregnancy mein haath pair sujj gaye hain
baby ki hilchal kam ho gayi
khaana nahi khaya ja raha pregnancy mein
garmi bahut lag rahi hai pregnancy mein
pregnancy mein sar dard ho raha hai
responses:
Pregnancy mein haath-paon ki sujan (swelling):
🟡 Thodi sujan normal hai 3rd trimester mein.
🔴 DANGER signs: Bahut tezi se sujan badhe, chehra suj jaye, ya sujan ke saath sar dard aur aankhon ke aage andhera — yeh PRE-ECLAMPSIA ho sakta hai.

Abhi BP check karwayen — ASHA worker ya PHC mein FREE hota hai. Agar BP high hai to aaj hospital jayein.

Chakkar aana pregnancy mein:
• Thoda chakkar — normal, uthte time dhheere uthein
• Bahut zyada chakkar + kamazoori — hemoglobin check karein (anemia ho sakta hai)
• Chakkar + tez sar dard + BP high — EMERGENCY, 108 call karein

Hemoglobin test FREE hai Nabha Civil Hospital mein.

Peshab mein jalan (UTI — Urinary Tract Infection):
• Pregnancy mein UTI common hai
• Zyada paani piyein (8-10 glass rooz)
• Doctor se consult zaroor karein — pregnancy mein UTI dangerous ho sakti hai
• Antibiotic doctor hi decide karenge — khud mat lein

Nabha Civil Hospital mein urine test FREE hai.

Ulti bahut ho rahi hai (Hyperemesis):
• Pehle 3 mahine mein thodi ulti normal hai
• Agar kuch bhi andar nahi reh raha 2 din se zyada — hospital jayein (drip chahiye ho sakti hai)
• Thoda thoda paani piyein — ORS bhi de sakte hain
• Ginger (adrak) wali chai help kar sakti hai

Dehydration se bacha jayein.

patterns: naya bachcha ghar aaya hai kya karein
newborn baby ko teeka kab lagega
baby ka paehla teeka kab hoga
baby ka wajan kam kyon hai
responses:
Nawajaate bachche ki dekhbhal (Newborn Care):

🤱 Breastfeeding: Janam ke 1 ghante ke andar shuru karein. Pehla doodh (colostrum — peela gaadha doodh) ZAROOR pilayein — yeh immunity deta hai.

🏠 Warmth: Bachche ko garam rakhen — kangaroo care (seene se lagayen) karo.

🧴 Naab (Umbilical Cord): Saaf aur sukha rakhen — kuch bhi mat lagayen.

💉 Teeke: Janam pe BCG + OPV-0 + Hep-B FREE milta hai hospital mein.

Newborn vaccination schedule (FREE at government hospital):
• Janam pe: BCG, OPV-0, Hepatitis B
• 6 hafte: Pentavalent, OPV, Rotavirus, fIPV
• 10 hafte: Pentavalent, OPV, fIPV
• 14 hafte: Pentavalent, OPV, Rotavirus
• 9 mahine: Measles-Rubella (MR), Vitamin A
• 16–24 mahine: Boosters

'Mother & Child Protection Card' hamesha saath rakhen.

Baby ka rang peela ho raha hai (Jaundice in newborn):
• Janam ke 2-3 din mein thoda peelapa normal hai
• Agar aankhein, haath, pair bhi peele hain ya 1 hafte ke baad bhi hai — TURANT hospital jayein
• Baby ko dhoop mein na rakhen — phototherapy (light treatment) hospital mein FREE milti hai JSSK scheme ke tahat

Colostrum (pehla doodh) kyon zaruri hai:
• Peela, gaada, thoda sa — yeh LIQUID GOLD hai
• Baby ki immunity banata hai
• Digestion sahi karta hai
• Jaamon ke 1 ghante mein pilana zaroori hai

Formula ya ghee-shakar NAHI — sirf maa ka doodh.

patterns: delivery ke liye paise milenge kya
JSSK scheme kya kya milta hai
pregnancy mein kya kya free milega
Ayushman card pregnancy mein kaam aayega
hospital mein delivery free hai kya
responses:
Pregnancy mein FREE government schemes:

👶 JSY (Janani Suraksha Yojana): Hospital mein delivery karne par ₹1,400 milte hain (BPL/SC/ST mahilaon ko). ASHA worker pura process mein help karti hai.

🏥 JSSK: Government hospital mein delivery ke liye sab kuch FREE — medicines, tests, transport, food, khoon, C-section bhi FREE.

📅 PMSMA: Har mahine 9 tarikh ko FREE antenatal check-up — BP, blood, urine, ultrasound sab.

Apni ASHA worker se milein — woh sab manage karengi.

JSSK (Janani Shishu Suraksha Karyakram) mein kya-kya FREE milta hai:
✅ Normal delivery
✅ C-section (cesarean)
✅ Saari medicines
✅ Blood transfusion
✅ Lab tests
✅ Ultrasound
✅ Diet (3 din)
✅ Transport to hospital aur wapas ghar
✅ Baby ki 30 din tak FREE treatment

Koi bhi sarkari aspatal mein milta hai — Nabha Civil Hospital included.

Ayushman Bharat PM-JAY:
• BPL families ke liye ₹5 lakh tak FREE cashless treatment
• C-section, complications, ICU sab cover hota hai
• Nabha Civil Hospital paneled hai
• Ayushman card banwayen — sirf Aadhar + Ration card chahiye
• Panchayat office ya CSC centre pe apply karein — FREE

PMSMA (Pradhan Mantri Surakshit Matritva Abhiyan):
• Har mahine 9 tarikh ko SPECIAL ANC day
• Specialist doctor milte hain — FREE
• FREE: BP, HB test, blood sugar, urine protein, ultrasound
• High-risk hain to identify kiya jaata hai
• Nadi Civil Hospital aur PHC-CHC sab mein hota hai

Yeh ek baar zaroor attend karein pregnancy mein.

patterns: digital health card pregnancy ke liye
pichle visits ki jankari kaise dekhun
bina internet apna data kaise dekhein
responses:
ABHA (Ayushman Bharat Health Account) — Aapka Digital Health ID:
• Ek baar banao — saari life ka health record store hoga
• Aapke ANC visits, blood tests, prescriptions automatically save
• Hospital counter pe ABHA number dijiye — pura record milega
• Offline bhi kaam karta hai — bar code print karwayen

FREE mein banwayen: Sirf Aadhar chahiye — Nabha Civil Hospital registration counter ya ASHA worker se.

ArogyaGram app mein aapka health record safe hai:
• Saare ANC visits ka data
• Blood pressure, Hemoglobin, weight history
• Risk assessment report
• Agle checkup ki date

Internet nahi hai to ASHA worker ke paas printed copy maangein ya hospital ke help desk pe ABHA number dijiye.

Agar pehle ka prescription ya report chahiye:
• ABHA card number se hospital counter se print mil sakta hai
• Pehle se li hui reports ki phone se photo kheenchen — emergency mein kaam aati hai
• Nabha Civil Hospital mein records 3 saal tak digital rakhte hain

patterns: ASHA worker kya kaam karti hai
anganwadi aur ASHA mein kya farak hai
ANC mein ASHA ka kya role hai
responses:
ASHA Worker (Accredited Social Health Activist):
• Har village mein ek ASHA worker hoti hai
• Pregnancy mein FREE home visits karti hain
• IFA, Calcium, TT vaccinations dilwati hain
• Hospital delivery ke time saath jaati hain (JSY)
• Emergency mein 108 call karwati hain aur transport arrange karti hain

ASHA worker ka number gram panchayat board ya anganwadi centre pe milta hai.

ANM (Auxiliary Nurse Midwife) kya karti hai:
• PHC / Sub-centre pe kaam karti hain
• ANC checkup karti hain — BP, weight, hemoglobin check
• Injections aur vaccinations deti hain
• Risky pregnancies identify karti hain
• CDSS (ArogyaGram) mein data enter karti hain

ASHA aur ANM milkar kaam karti hain — in dono se contact mein rahein.

Anganwadi Centre kya deta hai (FREE):
• Supplementary nutrition (pregnant aur lactating mothers ke liye)
• Growth monitoring (bachche ka wajan)
• Pre-school education
• Referral services
• IFA, Calcium tablets bhi milti hain yahan

Anganwadi aur ASHA milkar 'convergence' karte hain — dono se milein.

patterns: hemoglobin badhane ke liye kya khayein
baby ke liye kya khaana chahiye maa ko
pregnancy mein zyada neend aati hai bhook nahi lagti
kya kha sakte hain aur kya nahi
responses:
Pregnancy mein zaruri khaana (affordable & local):

🌿 Hara saag: Palak, methi, sarson — iron aur folate ke liye
🫘 Daalein: Masoor, moong, chana — protein ke liye
🥛 Doodh/Dahi: Calcium ke liye
🥚 Ande: Complete protein
🍋 Nimbu: Vitamin C — iron absorb karne mein help
🌾 Sattu: Bahut saste mein bharpoor protein

IFA tablet ke saath nimbu paani piyen — iron better absorb hoga.

Anemia (Khoon ki kami) ke liye:
• Hemoglobin 11 se kam ho to anemia hai
• Hb 7 se kam — SEVERE, hospital zaroor jayein
• IFA tablet RAAT ko lein — ulti kam hogi
• Palak, chana, kale chane, til roz khayein
• Chai ya coffee IRON TABLET KE SAATH NAI PIYEN — iron absorb nahi hoga

FREE iron tablets ASHA worker ya anganwadi se lein.

Pregnancy mein kya nahi khaana:
❌ Kachha meat ya kachche ande
❌ Papita (raw papaya)
❌ Zyada tel wala ya masaledar khana (ulti badhta hai)
❌ Alcohol & tobacco
❌ Zyada namak (BP badhta hai)

Gharelu nuskhe: Adrak wali chai — morning sickness mein help. Saunf — digestion theek karta hai.

Baby ki growth ke liye maa ko daily chahiye:
• 300 extra calories pregnancy mein
• 60g protein (2 ande + 1 cup daal + doodh = enough)
• 8-10 glass paani + ORS agar zyada paseena aata ho
• Roz 20 minute halki walk (jab doctor ne mana na kiya ho)

Khet mein kaam karne wali mahilayein zyada calorie chahiye — MUAC (mid-upper arm circumference) ANM zaroor check karein.

patterns: hospital door hai delivery ke liye
emergency mein gaadi kahan se milegi
JSSK mein transport free hai kya
responses:
🚑 FREE Ambulance: 108 (24/7, kisi bhi area se)
• Delivery ya obstetric emergency ke liye sundar prefer karengi mahilayein
• ASHA worker bhi transport arrange kar sakti hai JSY ke liye
• Apni ASHA worker ka number hamesha phone mein save rakhen

Referral System (ArogyaGram CDSS):
• Nabha Civil Hospital: Routine ANC aur normal deliveries
• Rajindra Hospital Patiala (35 km): High-risk cases — cardiology, nephrology, neurology
• PGI Chandigarh: EMERGENCY aur very complex cases

Referral letter Nabha se milega — JSSK ke tahat government transport ya fuel reimburse hota hai.

JSSK mein FREE transport milta hai:
• Ghar se hospital tak ambulance
• Hospital se ghar wapas
• Ek referral se doosre hospital tak
• Agar ambulance nahi mili: transport cost reimburse hoti hai — receipts rakhein

Social welfare officer se hospital mein milein — woh process karengi.

patterns: kya tum meri madad kar sakte ho
responses:
Namaste! Main MediSetu AI hoon — ArogyaGram maternal health platform ka hissa.

Main aapki madad kar sakta hoon:
🤰 ANC checkup schedule
💊 Pregnancy supplements (IFA, Calcium, TT)
🚨 Emergency obstetric guidance
👶 Newborn care
🏛️ Government schemes (JSY, JSSK, PMSMA, PM-JAY)

Kya poochna hai aapko?

Sat Sri Akal! ArogyaGram Health Assistant mein aapka swagat hai.

Main pregnancy, ANC visits, risk assessment, aur maternal health ke baare mein jawab de sakta hoon. ASHA worker ya ANM ke saath milkar kaam karta hoon.

Apna sawaal Hindi ya English mein poochein.

Hello! I'm MediSetu AI, the offline health assistant for the ArogyaGram CDSS platform. I specialise in:
• Antenatal care (ANC) guidance
• Maternal & neonatal health
• Risk classification & emergency triage
• Government maternal health schemes
• Newborn care after delivery

What can I help you with today?

Aap aise sawaal pooch sakte hain:
• 'Meri pregnancy ka agla checkup kab hai?'
• 'IFA tablet kab leni chahiye?'
• 'Baby halchal band ho gayi — kya karein?'
• 'FREE delivery ke liye kaunsi scheme hai?'
• 'Ambulance kaise bulayein?'

Mein aapki madad karunga — 🤰 seedha poochein!

patterns: doctor se abhi baat karni hai
responses:
🚨 EMERGENCY NUMBERS (Bina internet ke bhi kaam karte hain):

📞 Ambulance: 108 (FREE, 24/7)
📞 National Health Helpline: 104 (FREE, Doctor se phone pe baat)
📞 Nabha Civil Hospital: 01765-220033
📞 Rajindra Hospital Patiala: 0175-2212073

Yeh numbers hamesha apne phone mein save rakhen.

104 Helpline kya karta hai:
• Trained nurse ya doctor se FREE phone pe baat
• Hindi mein baat kar sakte hain
• Symptoms batayein — guidance milegi
• Hospital jaana zaroori hai ya nahi — yeh bhi batayein
• 24/7 available hai

Internet nahi hai tab bhi kaam karta hai — sirf basic phone signal chahiye.

eSanjeevani Telemedicine:
• Doctor se FREE video/phone call
• Nabha Civil Hospital se eSanjeevani available hai
• ASHA worker se help lein appointment ke liye
• Rural patients ke liye PHC se bhi telemedicine milti hai

patterns: Nabha hospital mein doctor hai kya
Civil Hospital mein kaunse doctor hain
maternity ward hai kya Nabha mein
responses:
Nabha Civil Hospital:
• OPD: Subah 8:00 AM – 2:00 PM (Monday–Saturday)
• Emergency: 24 ghante, 7 din
• Maternity ward: Available
• Lab tests: 8 AM – 12 PM (sample collection)
• Sunday: Sirf Emergency

Subah 7:30 baje pahunch jayen token lene — queue jaldi lagti hai.

Nabha Civil Hospital mein FREE services:
✅ Antenatal checkup (ANC)
✅ Normal delivery aur C-section
✅ Blood tests (HB, BP, sugar, urine protein)
✅ Ultrasound (referred patients ke liye)
✅ Vaccinations (maa aur bachche)
✅ IFA, Calcium, TT — FREE
✅ Emergency obstetric care

Koi payment nahi lagti in sab ke liye.

PMSMA Clinic — 9 tarikh ko har mahine:
• Specialist doctor milte hain
• High-risk maamle identify hote hain
• Ultrasound FREE milta hai agar zarurat ho
• Blood tests sab FREE

PHC aur CHC pe bhi hota hai — apni ASHA se puchein wahan ka schedule.

patterns: sir dard hai aur chakkar aa rahe hain
I feel very weak and tired
responses:
Bukhaar (Fever) pregnancy mein:
🟡 100°F–102°F: Paracetamol lein, zyada paani piyein — 24 ghante mein doctor se milein
🔴 102°F se zyada ya 2 din se zyada: Aaj hi Nabha Civil Hospital jayein — pregnancy mein tez bukhaar dangerous hai

Aspirin aur ibuprofen MAT lein — pregnancy ke liye safe nahi hain.

Thakaan / Kamazoori pregnancy mein:
• Aam baat hai — par bahut zyada thakaan Hemoglobin ki kami ka sign ho sakta hai
• Anemia check karwayen — Hb test FREE hai Civil Hospital mein
• IFA tablet lena band mat karein
• Kuch light khaatey rahein — 3 baar ki jagah 5-6 baar thoda thoda

Hb 7 se kam hai to — 🔴 HIGH RISK — hospital jayein aaj.

Pet dard pregnancy mein:
🟢 Normal: Ligament stretching (sharp pain sides mein — normal)
🟡 Consult: Continuous dard 2 ghante se zyada
🔴 EMERGENCY: Tez dard + bleeding + baby ki movement nahi — ABHI 108
